implementation_drift.description: Inline correction: 'neurodegeneration' is NOT substring of 'neurodegenerative' (differing letters at end). Adjusted overlap from 2 to 1 for fncom paper.

honest_note: Prion templating framing is biologically vivid but error-cascade-and-containment in LLM-MAS is THE published umbrella ('From Spark to Fire' 2603.04474, MemoryGraft 2512.16962, social-contagion framing in 2601.05504). Adding 'prion' as label doesn't unlock new mechanism.
